settings.dis_title: Get 15% Off on Valentine's Day Sale

settings.title: PRODUCT DETAILS
settings.content:
Elevate your gaming experience with the AutoFull M6 Ultra Black Gaming Chair – where cutting-edge ergonomics meets relentless comfort. Designed for champions, this chair delivers:

Key Features:Ultimate Climate Control – Dual cooling fans (66°F) & graphite heating (122°F) for all-season comfort.

Elastic Lumbar Massage – Dual vibration motors for fatigue-relieving support.

Dynamic Lumbar Tracking – Auto-adjusts to your spine (5'9"–6'2") with one-touch locking.

3D Ergonomic Neck Pillow – 60° tilt + 4" height adjustment for perfect head & neck alignment.

360° Smart Armrests – Rotate, tilt, and slide (3.5" height / 2.75" depth) for any posture.

Dominate in comfort. Built for Champions.

settings.title: WHAT'S INCLUDED
settings.content: Share some content to your customers about your products.

settings.title: Product Details
settings.content:
• Less Fatigue Even After Long Hours of Sitting: AutoFull gaming chair have upgraded the cushion of this gamer chair according to customer demand, removing the side wings that squeeze the legs, making the seat spacious and free, suitable for both small and large body types.
    The shaped wadding seat cushion, comfortable rebound, even after a long time playing games, the hip is not easy to be sore.

  • Everyting You Need for a Chair: AutoFull gaming chairs back can tilt freely between 90°-155°. When you are tired of working or gaming , you can use the gaming chairs with footrest to find a comfortable sleeping position for a short rest and help relieve fatigue. In addition, computer chair adjustable armrests can be adjusted up, down, left and right to provide better support for your arms and save storage space.

  • Extraordinarily Sturdy: Autofull gamer chair is built to last, with a strong integrated metal frame and heavy-duty nylon base. The backrest and seat cushion are reinforced with bandages for greater impact resistance and longer life. The seat cushion is made of high density shaped wadding, which is 30% denser than ordinary cushion foam and won't collapse easily. The SGS certified 4-level cylinder provides extra safety and stability.

  • After-sales Service: AutoFull gaming chair provides users with 36 months of parts replacement or repair service. If you have any suggestions for our computer chair, please feel free to contact us.

  • The World's Top Brands: As a leader in professional esports gaming chairs with over 1,000,000 users worldwide.AutoFull gaming chair has consistently maintained the top global sales position from 2016 to now. AutoFull gaming chair is a long-term strategic partner of top-tier leagues such as KPL

settings.title: Shipping Policy
settings.content:
Free Shipping – No minimum purchase required (available regions only).

Available Region: United States

Restricted shipping destinations include Puerto Rico (PR), Hawaii (HI), Guam (GU), and Alaska (AK).

Processing: 1-2 business days

Delivery: 3-7 business days via FedEx/UPS

Tracking: Email sent with tracking number upon shipment

* Exceptions may apply to distant and/or less accessible locations. We do not ship to PO boxes and Military APO, FPO and DPO destinations.

settings.title: Return Policy
settings.content:
Returns Accepted Within 14 Days

✔ Unused, original condition & packaging

✔ Proof of purchase required

✖ Custom/personalized items excluded

How to Return

Email service@autofull.com for return instructions

Ship to:1521 E Francis St, Ontario, CA 91761Attn: WYD-HZAF66-EC

Shipping Costs

• Customer pays for change-of-mind returns

• We cover defective/wrong item returns

Refund Process

• No restocking fees

• Refund to original payment method (3-5 business days after inspection)

Need Help?Contact us if refund doesn't appear after checking with your bank.

settings.title: Warranty
settings.content: AutoFull provides full product responsibility for 3 years from the date of purchase for most items.

settings.title: Exquisite Embroidery Craft
settings.content: There are up to 240,700 stitches of embroidery on the whole chair, which is beautiful, strong and full of ingenious details.

settings.title: Dynamic Tracking Lumbar Support
settings.content:
• Auto-Adjusting 4D Support - Moves with your spine in all directions for perfect alignment
  • Quick-Lock System - Secure your ideal position with one simple twist
  • Universal Gamer Fit - Designed for players of all sizes (5'9" to 6'2" optimal range)

    The support that adapts to you - so you can focus on the game

settings.title: 3D Ergonomic Gaming Lumbar Support Pillow
settings.content: Specially engineered for long gaming sessions, this advanced 3D contoured pillow dynamically adapts to your spine's natural curve. The pressure-relief design cradles your lower back with medical-grade precision, eliminating slouching and sedentary discomfort.

settings.title: Punk Graffiti Precision Embroidery
settings.content: Erupts with attitude through its bomb-pattern graffiti design, meticulously crafted with high-density embroidery technology. Each stitch captures the raw energy of street art while maintaining premium durability—no peeling or fading, just permanent urban flair.

settings.title: Rotate The Lifting Armrest
settings.content:
Engineered for dynamic gaming postures, these premium armrests deliver multi-dimensional support:

  • 7cm Height Adjustment - Seamlessly align with your desk or gaming setup
  • 60° Smooth Rotation - Natural wrist positioning for keyboard/mouse transitions
  • U-Shaped Anti-Slip Surface - Textured padding locks elbows in place during intense gameplay

    The innovative lift-rotate mechanism ensures continuous elbow support whether you're leaning forward in FPS mode or reclining during cutscenes. No more dead-arm mid-match - just fluid adaptability for marathon sessions.

settings.title: 100,000 Wear-resistant Leather
settings.content:
• 100,000+ Rub-Resistant Leather – Lab-tested to withstand years of intense use without cracking or peeling
  • Lotus Leaf Bionic Firming Layer – Micro-textured coating repels spills like water off a lotus leaf, while maintaining soft-touch suppleness
  • EU REACH-Certified Easy-Clean Coating – Non-toxic, stain-resistant surface wipes clean with one swipe (certified skin-safe)

No sticky armrests or worn patches—just tournament-grade durability that stays pristine through sweat, snacks, and endless gaming marathons.

settings.title: Multi-Angle Reclining System (90°-155°)
settings.content:
• 90° PC Gaming Mode - Upright posture for competitive keyboard/mouse play
  • 110° Mobile Gaming - Slight recline reduces neck strain during controller use
  • 155° Full Rest Position - Near-flat relaxation for between-match recovery

    The heavy-duty tilt mechanism transitions seamlessly from focused gameplay to instant nap-ready comfort—all with one-handed adjustment. No wobble, no slippage, just fluid transitions that match your playstyle.

settings.title: Mixed Shipment Notice
settings.content: Due to product line adjustments, the appearance of the footrest and headrest may vary. Two versions will be shipped randomly, but this does not affect functionality or usage. For more details, please contact customer service.

settings.title: 160° Reclining Function
settings.content:
• Wide-Range Recline
    90° upright to 160° near-flat positions
  • Full-Body Support
    Pairs with footrest for optimal relaxation
  • Space-Saving Armrests
    4D adjustable design folds up when not in use

settings.title: World's First Ventilated & Heated Esports Throne
settings.content:
• Stay Cool When the Heat Is On
    Beat the summer sweat with our gaming chair’s turbo-charged dual-fan cooling, blasting airflow to chill your seat to a refreshing 66.2°F. No more sticky backs or distracted gameplay.

  • Warm Up When the Cold Hits
    When temperatures drop, rapid graphite heating kicks in, wrapping you in soothing warmth up to 122°F. Perfect for chilly nights or frosty mornings, keeping you cozy and relaxed while you game.

  • Smart Climate Control for Every Season
    With 3-level adjustable cooling & heating, this gaming chair adapts to your environment—keeping you cool when it’s hot, warm when it’s cold, and always in the zone.

settings.title: 4D Adjustable Armrests
settings.content: The 4D armrests are adjustable in multiple directions—forward and backward, left and right, up and down, with rotation options. This ensures solid support for your arms during intense gaming sessions, making it ideal for extended competitive activities.

settings.title: Adjustable Headrest
settings.content: The revolutionary headrest of the AutoFull M5 gaming chair is mounted on a slide rail, allowing for height adjustments of up to 2.36 inches. This ensures full neck support for users between 4'11" and 6'3" while permitting precise customization. Coupled with a 90° to 160° stepless reclining feature, the newly designed headrest effectively supports your neck without causing strain.

settings.title: Wingless Seat Cushion
settings.content: The AutoFull M5 gaming chair features an ultra-wide seat measuring 20.66 inches, designed for comfort and space. This roomy seat allows for leg crossing and prolonged sitting without discomfort. Crafted from breathable leather and filled with a 4.52-inch ultra-thick high-resilience urethane foam, this chair combines cushioning with breathability, adapting to the user’s body shape. It also includes a built-in spring coil with optimal stiffness, providing adequate support and evenly distributing body pressure while maintaining flexible comfort.

settings.title: Experience Ultimate Comfort and Durability
settings.content: The chair reclines from 90° to 160° for customizable comfort, features five quiet casters for smooth mobility, and includes an extendable ottoman for added relaxation. Plus, it’s equipped with an SGS Grade 4 Global Safety Certified gas lift, supporting weights of up to 875 lbs, making it perfect for any user.

settings.title: Recline System
settings.content:
• 160° Full Recline – Perfect for gaming, resting or power naps
  • Seamless Angle Adjustment – Smooth transition from 90° work mode to 160° relax mode
  • Integrated Footrest Compatibility – Full-body support in every position

settings.title: Revitalizing Lumbar Massage System
settings.content:
• Dual Massage Motors - Targets lower back tension with soothing vibrations
  • 3 Adjustable Modes - Choose from gentle, rhythmic, or firm massage intensity
  • One-Touch Control - Instant relief at the press of a button

Perfect for:
✓ Long work sessions
✓ Evening relaxation
✓ Post-workout recovery

Refresh your body without leaving your seat

settings.title: Next-Gen Head & Neck Support - 3D ErgoCloud Neck Pillow
settings.content:
• Dual-Side Adjustment - Customize left/right support independently
  • 60° Multi-Angle Tilt - Perfect alignment for your head position
  • Smart Orbital Movement - 1.25" forward/back + 4" vertical flexibility
  • Universal Fit - Optimized for users 5'3" to 6'4"

settings.title: Precision Within Your Reach
settings.content: Custom lumbar support that adapts to your natural curve.

settings.title: Relax in Every Move
settings.content: Back massage to keep you at your best, every match.

settings.title: A Cloud of Comfort, From Any Angle.
settings.content: Tailor your headrest like a second organ, for perfect relaxation.

settings.title: Unmatched Comfort, Any Season
settings.content: Temperature-controlled seat for ultimate relaxation, whatever the weather.

settings.title: 360° Mechanical Arms
settings.content: 360° Unobstructed Arm Supports

settings.title: 160° Reclining
settings.content: 435mm integrated footrest for a relaxing nap.

settings.title: Upgrade Your Setup with Ultimate Comfort
settings.content: Take your gaming and workspace to the next level with a chair designed for performance, comfort, and style. Engineered for long hours of play and work, it’s the perfect blend of ergonomics and aesthetics.

settings.title: quote
settings.content: Finally, a gaming chair that thinks about what matters most: your body temperature! With the AutoFull M6, you get a feature no one else has.

settings.subheading: International Chiropractic Association (ICA)Doctor of Chiropractic Care
settings.title: Dr. Dennis Miller
settings.content: Dr. Dennis Miller, a highly regarded Doctor of Chiropractic, graduated with honors from Palmer College of Chiro-practic, the top institution in the field, in 1976. He is an active member of the ICA and ICAC. Dr. Miller brings his ex-tensive expertise to our flagship products, providing professional solutions for sedentary users with AutoFull M6 series.

settings.title: Play Fearlessly | 3-Year Warranty Backed
settings.content: AutoFull a professional competitive peripheral equipment brand, has 10 years of professional production experience. We have high standards for product details and are committed to "providing healthy competition and extreme game experience for global players".

settings.title: Product specification
settings.content: Experience ultimate comfort and functionality with these standout features

settings.title: WHAT DOES YOUR WARRANTY COVER?
settings.content: Every AutoFull product is designed and tested for industry-leading safety and durability. That’s why we stand behind all our chairs and desks with up to a 3-year extended warranty. Aesthetic defects and damage due to misuse of product are not covered.To make a warranty claim, submit your claim via our Contact page, along with image or video evidence of the affected area. AutoFull reserves the final right to determine if a benefit under the warranty can be claimed.
